title: Add Meshtastic multi-section config sync records
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.6 currently emits one valid Config.LoRaConfig readback during want_config_id stage 69420, but Meshtastic apps may expect separate Config records for device, position, power, bluetooth, network, display, security, and device_ui. What needs to be done: define which read-only config sections are required by Android/iOS/Python app sync, encode each as a separate valid FromRadio.config oneof record, add native_sim tests and update meshtastic_app_compat vectors. Acceptance criteria: no Config payload contains multiple oneof variants; app-visible placeholders for position/power/bluetooth are explicit; sequence/vector docs match implementation.
